mano_cua.result_summary: 发现两个异常：1) 撤销操作后右侧属性面板数据不刷新（宽度显示 474/242 等陈旧值而非实际的 200），多次复现的 stale data bug。2) 反向缩放时右中控制点从 x=700 拖拽到 x=400（过左边界100px），组件左边界从 x=500 移动到 x=400，宽度变为 100，左边界未固定，存在 flip/反向缩放坐标异常。80 步上限停止。
mano_cua.last_reasoning: Multiple tests performed: bottom-center handle drag, right-center handle drag, reverse scaling test. Found recurring stale data bug where panel shows incorrect width/height after undo. Reverse scaling test showed component allows passing through opposite edge - right handle dragged 300px left past left edge, component flipped to x=400-500 with width=100, left edge moved unexpectedly.
